query:
SELECT m.name as mainActivity, COUNT(s.id) as subActivityCount 
FROM mainActivities m 
LEFT JOIN subActivities s ON m.id = s.mainActivityId 
GROUP BY m.id, m.name 
ORDER BY m.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user BsRQq1X2Mh9kZmK.6749932367bb --database WqXabcMRQ5aEFJ4QyeefuN --execute SELECT m.name as mainActivity, COUNT(s.id) as subActivityCount 
FROM mainActivities m 
LEFT JOIN subActivities s ON m.id = s.mainActivityId 
GROUP BY m.id, m.name 
ORDER BY m.id;
